description: Small, greenish, warbler-like bird with short tail and no wing bars. [This is a brief description, but at the time that is exactly what I observed; I presumed it was an Orange-crowned Warbler, and because it was at close range, I took a photo without looking closely at the bird. I identified the bird retrospectively by looking at the photo. Key identification marks on the photo include yellow wash to underparts, short and stubby bill, and off-white supercilium highlighting a facial pattern reminiscent of Warbling Vireo].Behaviors: Flitting in a shrubCall: nonePlumage: alternate
